goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants.
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve 'turkish' food and should be in the 'expensive' price range.
The restaurant should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'address'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the 'same price range as the restaurant' and should have 'a star of 2'.
The hotel should 'include free parking'.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.
You also want to book a 'taxi' to commute between the two places.
You want to leave the 'hotel' by '09:45'.
Make sure you get 'contact number' and 'car type'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve turkish food and should be in the expensive price range
The restaurant should be in the centre
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the same price range as the restaurant and should have a star of 2
The hotel should include free parking
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to leave the hotel by 09:45
Make sure you get contact number and car type
